basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support-II Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Jodhpur
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Jodhpur (AIIMS Jodhpur) Project Technical Support-II (Project Nurse) Walk-in Notification 2026 has been released on 11 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support-II (Project Nurse) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 32 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: BSc Nursing, GNM with 2 years experience in Neonatology
qualification.details: Project Technical Support-II (Project Nurse): Essential: Four-Year Nursing Course (BSc. Nursing) or Diploma in Nursing (GNM) + Two years of Experience in Neonatology. Desirable: Experience in Neonatology.

selection_process: Walk-In Interview Written Examination (if large number of applications)

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support-II (Project Nurse) Job 2026 Not

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Project Technical Support-II (Project Nurse) at All India Institute of Medical Sciences Jodhpur.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Project Technical Support-II (Project Nurse) position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in Interview. Candidates do not need to apply online beforehand.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to apply?
faq.answer: The last date to apply is the Walk-in Interview date, which is 20 June 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Four-Year Nursing Course (BSc. Nursing) or Diploma in Nursing (GNM) with at least two years of experience in Neonatology.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for the candidates?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates is 32 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for this post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 36,400.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve a Walk-In Interview. A written examination may be conducted if there is a large number of applications.

faq.question: Q10. Where will the Walk-in Interview be held?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be held at All India Institute of Medical Sciences Jodhpur, Rajasthan, 342005.
